name: io.github.danboabes/mcpdomain
title: MCPDomain
description: Buy & manage domains from any AI chat: availability, register, DNS, email forwarding, AI bot stats.

environmentVariables.name: OPENSRS_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Operation mode: 'mock' for testing (default) or 'live' for real OpenSRS API calls.

environmentVariables.name: OPENSRS_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: OpenSRS reseller username (only required in live mode).

environmentVariables.name: OPENSRS_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenSRS API key (only required in live mode).
